content: Hi, I'm Skyler, and I'm a Podcast Host covering true crime. I'm looking to learn some new skills to help me improve my podcast and reach a wider audience.
Hi Skyler! It's great that you're looking to learn new skills and grow your podcast. What specific areas of podcasting are you interested in learning more about?

I've been thinking about learning more about audio production and editing, maybe taking some courses or getting some feedback from other podcasters. I've also been trying to get into hiking and tennis, just to get some exercise and clear my head.

That's a great idea! Audio production and editing can make a huge difference in the quality of your podcast. And it's wonderful that you're prioritizing your physical and mental health. Have you considered joining a hiking or tennis group to meet other people who share your interests?

Yeah, I've thought about it. I've actually been talking to my friend, Emily, about it, and she's been really helpful. I'm thinking about attending a conference on podcasting on March 20th to learn more about the latest trends and best practices.
That sounds like a great idea! Conferences can be a great way to learn new skills and network with other professionals in your field. What do you hope to get out of the conference?

I'm hoping to learn more about the latest research and advancements in podcasting, and maybe even meet some other podcasters who can offer some guidance and support. I'm also thinking about taking some calligraphy classes on the side, just for fun.
That sounds like a great hobby! Calligraphy can be a beautiful and creative way to express yourself. Have you thought about what kind of projects you'd like to work on?

Yeah, I've been thinking about it. I'd like to create some custom artwork for my podcast, maybe some logos or illustrations. I'm also thinking about finishing my part-time MBA program, which I've been working on for about a year now.
That's impressive! Finishing an MBA program is a big accomplishment. What do you hope to do with your degree once you've finished?

I'm hoping to use my degree to help me advance in my career and maybe even start my own business. I'm thinking about moving to a new city, maybe Denver or Seattle, to explore new opportunities and experiences.

That sounds like a great plan! It's always exciting to start a new chapter in your life and explore new possibilities. Well, it was great chatting with you, Skyler! I hope you find the conference and your hobbies to be helpful in your career and personal growth.
Yeah, thanks for the chat! I'm looking forward to my next podcast episode and maybe even doing some collaborations with other podcasters in the area.
Sounds like a plan! Good luck with your podcast and your MBA program. I'll be rooting for you!
Thanks, I appreciate it! I'm also thinking about doing some volunteer work with a local non-profit organization, maybe something related to education or the environment.
That's a great idea! Volunteering can be a wonderful way to give back to your community and make a positive impact. What kind of volunteer work are you interested in doing?
